mapper.insert:
insert into base_staff_binding_relation ( rel_id, staff_id, created_by, created_date ) values
( #{param.relId}, #{staffId}, #{param.createdBy}, #{param.opTime} )
mapper.select: select count(stf.id) from base_staff_binding_relation rel LEFT JOIN base_staff stf on rel.staff_id = stf.id LEFT JOIN base_staff_duty duty ON stf.id = duty.staff_id LEFT JOIN base_staff_type type ON duty.staff_type_id = type.id LEFT JOIN base_organization org on stf.org_id = org.id

select stf.id as id, stf.org_id as orgId, stf.user_id as userId, stf.staff_code as staffCode, stf.realname as realname, stf.sex as sex, stf.phone as phone, stf.province_code, stf.province_name, stf.city_code, stf.city_name, stf.district_code, stf.district_name, stf.street_code, stf.street_name, stf.address, stf.employment_type, stf.state as state, rel.id as relation_id, rel.rel_id as relId, rel.created_by as created_by, rel.created_date as created_date from base_staff_binding_relation rel LEFT JOIN base_staff stf on rel.staff_id = stf.id LEFT JOIN base_staff_duty duty ON stf.id = duty.staff_id LEFT JOIN base_staff_type type ON duty.staff_type_id = type.id
GROUP by stf.id

select stf.id as id, stf.org_id as orgId, stf.user_id as userId, stf.staff_code as staffCode, stf.realname as realname, stf.sex as sex, stf.phone as phone, stf.province_code, stf.province_name, stf.city_code, stf.city_name, stf.district_code, stf.district_name, stf.street_code, stf.street_name, stf.address, stf.employment_type, stf.state as state, rel.id as relation_id, rel.rel_id as relId, rel.created_by as created_by, rel.created_date as created_date from base_staff_binding_relation rel LEFT JOIN base_staff stf on rel.staff_id = stf.id where rel.rel_id = #{queryParam.relId} and stf.staff_code = #{queryParam.staffCode} GROUP by stf.id limit 1

SELECT stf.id as id, stf.org_id as orgId, stf.user_id as userId, stf.staff_code as staffCode, stf.realname as realname, stf.sex as sex, stf.phone as phone, stf.province_code, stf.province_name, stf.city_code, stf.city_name, stf.district_code, stf.district_name, stf.street_code, stf.street_name, stf.address, stf.employment_type, stf.state as state, duty.staff_type_id, type.type_name as staff_type_name FROM base_staff as stf LEFT JOIN base_staff_duty as duty on stf.id=duty.staff_id left join base_staff_type type on duty.staff_type_id=type.id WHERE stf.id not in (select staff_id from base_staff_binding_relation rel where rel.rel_id=#{queryParam.relId}) and stf.org_id = #{queryParam.buId} and stf.state =1 GROUP BY stf.id
